recommendations.title: Soul Surfer
recommendations.overview: The true story of teen surfer Bethany Hamilton, who lost her arm in a shark attack and courageously overcame all odds to become a champion again, through her sheer determination and unwavering faith.

recommendations.title: The Miracle Season
recommendations.overview: After the tragic death of star volleyball player Caroline "Line" Found, a team of dispirited high school girls must band together under the guidance of their tough-love coach in hopes of winning the state championship!

recommendations.title: The King's Daughter
recommendations.overview: King Louis XIV's quest for immortality leads him to capture and steal a mermaid's life force, a move that is further complicated by his illegitimate daughter's discovery of the creature.

recommendations.title: The Cutting Edge: Going for the Gold
recommendations.overview: Two ice skaters develop a love-hate relationship while dreaming of Olympic glory.

recommendations.title: Dangerous Game: The Legacy Murders
recommendations.overview: A family reunion at a remote mansion takes a lethal turn when they are trapped inside and forced to play a deadly survival game where only one will make it out alive.

recommendations.title: Reagan
recommendations.overview: Told through the voice of former KGB agent Viktor Petrovich, whose life becomes inextricably linked with Ronald Reagan's when Reagan first caught the Soviets’ attention as an actor in Hollywood, Reagan overcomes the odds to become the 40th president

recommendations.title: Raise Your Voice

recommendations.title: On a Wing and a Prayer
recommendations.overview: After their pilot dies unexpectedly mid-flight, passenger Doug White must safely land a plane and save his entire family from insurmountable danger.

recommendations.title: The Even Stevens Movie
recommendations.overview: The Stevens think that they've won an all-expenses-paid trip to an island halfway around the world. When their house is destroyed, their food stolen, and their bacon eaten, the Stevens family crumbles, unaware that their family vacation is in fact a

recommendations.title: Spare Parts
